Add yuzu kosho, aji amarillo, gari juice, and water to a vitamix blender and blend until smooth
Slowly add the grapeseed oil to the blender while blending, careful to emulsify.
Add the white ponzu, Calamansi syrup yuzu juice and lemon juice to the mixture; continue to blend smooth.
Add xantham gum slowly, ensuring desired consistency and an even mix.
Reserve in quart containers and store in a cooler.
